description: Comopsition Black round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach or scrub Tumble dry Warm iron; but do not iron on decorations Do not dry clean A perfect piece for the urban rebel, this Levi's T-shirt boldly proclaims "Blame your tools" in a graphic print on the front. Make your statement, literally, and add this piece to your ensemble, recreating a contemporary version of the angry young man. Team it with faded jeans and colourful sneakers to pull off the rebel-without-a-cause look.
